findings.rule: Use the repository's existing active-administrator policy helper.

evidence.detail: Both actions repeat the same policy.
The repository already centralizes this exact rule.

findings.concern: The change creates three independently editable definitions of one authorization policy.
findings.impact: Future policy changes can leave these actions inconsistent and increase reviewer cognitive load.
findings.expected_effect: Remove duplicated policy while preserving behavior.

next_action: Reuse the existing authorization helper and rerun focused tests.
